snippet.title: I Break Game Of Thrones In CK3 with 𝘿𝙀𝙑𝙀𝙇𝙊𝙋𝙀𝙍 𝘼𝙋𝙋𝙍𝙊𝙑𝙀𝘿 𝙈𝙀𝘾𝙃𝘼𝙉𝙄𝘾𝙎
snippet.description:
Welcome to the ASOIAF or Game Of Thrones Mod In Crusader Kings 3! This is the best game of thrones video game ever made and of course its just a free mod that you can download. Now I am of course The Spiffing brit a professional exploiter and breaker of games! My entire goal is to use bugs, glitches, exploits and design flaws to create some absurdly overpowered characters that can breeze through every challenge placed in front of them. Well today I decided to find the greatest of challenges and that comes in the form of the white walkers in game of thrones. Now thanks to some mods we can simulate the arrival of the night king and his absolute destruction of the entire world. Of course to go up against the world ending apocalypse of a threat we have todays hero the single greatest and most overpowered video game character. Reanu Keeves. The perfect being which thanks to some creative exploits we are able to turn into an unstoppable force! After watching all of Dunc And Egg I naturally got very addicted again to this fantasy universe so here we are! So lets find out if Crusader Kings 3 Is A Perfectly Balanced Game With No Exploits Or If the game will still try its best to destroy me!

snippet.title: Manelele Viitorului - DU-TE DU-TE (Official Video)
snippet.description:
💔🔥 Manelele Viitorului – DU-TE DU-TE (Official Video)

„Haide du-te du-te du-te… te trec la iubiri pierdute” 💔
Dacă ai trecut printr-o relație care te-a terminat… piesa asta e pentru tine.

🎶 „DU-TE DU-TE” este o manea de despărțire cu atitudine, nerv și vibe de balans, genul ăla de piesă pe care o pui tare și zici: gata, s-a terminat!

💥 Refrenul este extrem de catchy și făcut să prindă peste tot:
👉 TikTok
👉 mașină
👉 chefuri

💭 Dar vine momentul în care zici:
👉 „ia du-te-n durerea mea!”

🔥 Fix stilul Manelele Viitorului:
👉 emoție + nerv + adevăr + vibe de hit

📲 Scrie în comentarii:

snippet.title: Anime “Dragon Ball Super: Beerus” | SUPER GEKITOU Trailer
snippet.description:
The SUPER Brawl between Goku and Beerus!
At the end, Frieza is seen awaiting his resurrection ――

Series Premieres in Fall of 2026!
The anime Dragon Ball Super, original work, story, and character design by Akira Toriyama, is set to begin anew as Dragon Ball Super: Beerus in Fall 2026!

#dragonball #dragonballsuper

◾️Anime “Dragon Ball Super: Beerus” | SUPER Launch Trailer
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OOmRInABehI

◾️INTRODUCTION
The globally beloved manga DRAGON BALL by Akira Toriyama continues to captivate fans through a wide range of media—from TV animation, movies, games, and merchandising—standing as a top-ranked title with extraordinary worldwide popularity. 
Now, in 2026, the anime Dragon Ball Super, original work, story, and character design by Akira Toriyama, is set to begin anew as Dragon Ball Super: Beerus! This ENHANCED edition introduces a large volume of newly added and redrawn cuts, as well as a reconstructed narrative. With cutting-edge visual expression, the series delivers even more immersive battle scenes and a more faithful representation of the original manga—bringing an ENHANCED edition to life like never before.

Several years have passed since the fierce battle against Majin Buu, and Earth has finally regained a brief moment of peace. At the same time, Beerus, the God of Destruction, awakens from his long, deep sleep. Even Kai and Supreme Kai, aware of Beerus’s overwhelming power to destroy entire planets, watch his awakening with great fear… Meanwhile, Beerus hears rumors of a Saiyan who defeated Frieza—and suddenly appears before Goku.
Targeted by Beerus, the strongest being in the universe, Earth is in grave danger. Thus begins an Earth-shattering cosmic battle between the God of Destruction and Goku and his allies—a conflict that will shake the entire universe.

Original Work, Story & Character Design: Akira Toriyama

snippet.title: "He's Very Unwell" - Marsh Family parody of Chuck Berry's "Never Can Tell" from Pulp Fiction
snippet.description:
The issue of Christian nationalism and claims to righteousness for US military action has surfaced in a few stories this week, so we decided to merge them together in one song. We had to pick something from the Pulp Fiction soundtrack (1994), because that’s the movie script that’s been in the media spotlight since being bizarrely parroted in a prayer service at the Pentagon led by the US Secretary of Defence, Pete Hegseth. Although we were sorely torn by “Son of a Preacher Man” (a better song), in the end we plumped for the iconic twist track that features the smooth moves of Uma Thurman and John Travolta in a café running a dance contest, and is titled “You Never Can Tell” (though often referred to as “C’est La Vie”). The track was written by Chuck Berry while he was in federal prison and finally released in 1964.

The verses gave us the chance to poke some fun at three circling stories: Pete Hegseth’s language and attempt to render a Samuel L. Jackson monologue, amidst his hawkish attitude and celebration of violence and vengeance in the Iran war; Donald Trump’s posting on his Truth Social account of a ridiculous picture of him in a Christ-like pose, before backtracking and claiming he thought he was a doctor; and the deepening chasm between the White House’s discourse and policies and the Christian ethos explained by the Pope. 

You can backfill on these stories here: 
- https://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/americas/us-politics/pete-hegseth-bible-verse-pulp-fiction-b2959108.html
- https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/videos/c624dy3pgg2o 

___________________________

DIGITAL: https://orcd.co/hollowchapters 
PHYSICAL: CDs or LPs: https://themarshfamily.bandcamp.com/album/hollow-chapters

___________________________ 

Support us here: 
- PayPal to leave us a tip jar: https://paypal.me/marshfamilysongs 
- Patreon for ongoing support & bonuses: https://www.patreon.com/marshfamilysongs 

Find our other channels here: https://linktr.ee/marshfamilysongs 

Follow us here: 
- https://www.marshfamilysongs.com 
- https://www.facebook.com/MarshFamilySongs/ 
- https://www.instagram.com/marshfamilysongs/ 
- https://twitter.com/MarshSongs 
- https://www.threads.net/@marshfamilysongs 
- https://www.tiktok.com/@marshfamilysongs 
- https://bsky.app/profile/marshfamilysongs.bsky.social 
- https://open.spotify.com/artist/6AYmbCwi92V29y69lkRkRa 

___________________________ 

LYRICS: 
He was a TV anchor and he quoted scripture well
You could see that Pete did truly love a media bombshell
But now there’s something kinda peculiar ‘bout his Ezekiel
Could it be it’s Pulp Fiction?! It goes to show he’s very unwell!

He liked to run his Department like a Sitroom faux crusade
A lot of Christian fervour, but the cant was weapons-grade
He fired a lot of missiles, and a lot of veteran personnel
With his memes and his war jokes, it goes to show he’s very unwell!

He had a harebrained weirdo boss, who liked to self-fantasize
He shared a corny little AI mock-up of himself as Christ
But then Trump took it down, because of all the folk his pic repelled
“Bugger me” said the whole world, “it goes to show he’s very unwell!”

They’re kind of souped-up Christians, with a warped Christianity
And you know, when the Pope, is provoked – they’ve kind of gone to extremes
JD Vance thinks the answer’s for the Pontiff not to raise too much hell
Guess if Jesus had crypto, he’d let them go and fire all them shells!

You see the way they’re heading, well it’s coming here as well
Victor Orban’s a has-been, but there’s plenty other alarm bells 
So when your neighbours chat of “Armageddon with the infidels”
Have some tea with the old folks – it’s better than to threaten death knells

________________

snippet.title: Tarzan: Live Action - (2026) | Chris Hemsworth, Amanda Seyfried | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#Tarzan #ChrisHemsworth #ConceptTrailer

Watch This Tarzan Live Action Fan-Made Concept Trailer

What if the legendary king of the jungle swung back onto the big screen with Chris Hemsworth embodying the raw power and primal grace of Tarzan? This concept trailer reimagines the classic tale with breathtaking jungle landscapes, visceral action sequences, and a deeply emotional story of a man torn between two worlds. Amanda Seyfried brings new life to Jane Porter while Arnold Schwarzenegger commands the screen in a role that adds unexpected intensity to this wild adventure. Every scene was crafted to honor the timeless legacy while pushing the story into bold new territory.

The storyboard and all visuals in this trailer were personally created by me as a passionate "What If" project exploring a modern Tarzan adaptation. I envisioned Hemsworth channeling the untamed spirit of a man raised among apes, connecting with audiences through both heart and spectacle. From thundering elephant stampedes to intimate moments beneath the jungle canopy, this concept captures the adventure and wonder that made Tarzan an enduring icon. This is my personal love letter to one of fiction's greatest heroes and the incredible cast I dream could bring him to life.

Disclaimer: This is a fan-made concept trailer and a personal "What If" creative project. It is not affiliated with Edgar Rice Burroughs Inc., Warner Bros., Disney, or any official Tarzan production. All storyboard work and visuals were independently created by me for entertainment purposes only.



Along with fan-made trailers, I also share movie reviews, news, and updates from the world of entertainment. Be sure to hit that subscribe button and stay updated on all the latest from my channel!

snippet.description:
Linkin Park - Numb
Get:

Lyrics:

[Verse 1: Chester Bennington]
I'm tired of being what you want me to be
Feeling so faithless, lost under the surface
I don't know what you're expecting of me
Put under the pressure of walking in your shoes

[Pre-Chorus: Chester Bennington & Mike Shinoda]
Caught in the undertow, just caught in the undertow
Every step that I take is another mistake to you
Caught in the undertow, just caught in the undertow

[Chorus: Chester Bennington]
I've become so numb, I can't feel you there
Become so tired, so much more aware
I'm becoming this, all I want to do
Is be more like me and be less like you!

[Verse 2: Chester Bennington]
Can't you see that you're smothering me?
Holding too tightly, afraid to lose control
'Cause everything that you thought I would be
Has fallen apart, right in front of you

[Pre-Chorus: Chester Bennington & Mike Shinoda]
Caught in the undertow, just caught in the undertow
Every step that I take is another mistake to you
Caught in the undertow, just caught in the undertow
And every second I waste is more than I can take

[Chorus: Chester Bennington]
I've become so numb, I can't feel you there
Become so tired, so much more aware
I'm becoming this, all I want to do
Is be more like me and be less like you

[Bridge: Chester Bennington]
And I know I may end up failing, too
But I know you were just like me
With someone disappointed in you

[Chorus: Chester Bennington]
I've become so numb, I can't feel you there
Become so tired, so much more aware
I'm becoming this, all I want to do
Is be more like me and be less like you

[Outro: Chester Bennington]
I've become so numb, I can't feel you there
I'm tired of being what you want me to be
I've become so numb, I can't feel you there
I'm tired of being what you want me to be

snippet.title: [Official Trailer] WU อู #WUTheSeries
snippet.description:
พีท (นานิ หิรัญกฤษฎิ์) ชายหนุ่มผู้อับโชคซึ่งมีเศษวิญญาณปีศาจอยู่ในตัว ทำให้สัมผัสได้ถึง เหยาพลังงานประหลาดที่ออกมากลืนกินพลังชีวิตของผู้คน จึงได้พบกับ นิรันดร์ (สกาย วงศ์รวี) ชายหนุ่มที่นำพาให้เขาเข้าไปในโลกแห่ง “อู” ทั้งสองได้กลายเป็นคู่หูจำเป็นและได้รวบรวมทีมเพื่อร่วมกันปราบเหยาและปัดเป่าสิ่งชั่วร้าย!
 
 นิรันดร์ พีท และทีมปราบปีศาจจะร่วมมือกันผ่านพ้นอุปสรรคได้ไหม และความสัมพันธ์ของทั้งคู่จะผูกพันกันด้วยจิตวิญญาณได้อย่างไร ติดตามได้ใน “WU อู” ทุกวันอังคาร เวลา 20:30 น. ทางช่อง GMM25 รับชมย้อนหลังที่แรกได้ที่ VIU เวลา 21:30 น. เริ่ม 5 พฤษภาคมนี้
กำกับซีรีส์ : วาสุเทพ เกตุเพ็ชร์

รายชื่อนักแสดง
สกาย วงศ์รวี นทีธร                 รับบท  นิรันดร์

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.
